title: Pabstiella pantherina
taxonomy: Pabstiella pantherina is classified within the family Pleurothallidinae, which is a sub-tribe of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This classification is part of the larger taxonomic system that groups Pabstiella pantherina alongside other similar orchids. The genus Pabstiella itself is a group of orchids that are native to the Americas and are characterized by their delicate, epiphytic growth. The species Pabstiella pantherina is further distinguished by its unique combination of physical characteristics, such as its panther-like markings and flower shape. Overall, the classification of Pabstiella pantherina reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids.
